notes: Full dinner menu captured from the homepage-rendered menu (Starters, Earth, Sea, Land) plus a selection of cocktails and wines-by-the-glass (the glass list is a rotating selection, not exhaustive). Seasonal/'farm & wild' spring menu. One item explicitly marked gluten-free (Skillet Baked Focaccia).
